description: Plugin-distributed hooks for data-platform. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable data-platform smells — (1) inline secrets in .tsx/.ts/.js/.py/.yml/.sql, (2) Postgres CREATE TABLE with tenant_id but no ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY, (3) JWT expiration >30min in JWT-issuance code, (4) per-viewer-priced BI tool references in stack-decision-record.md templates. Set DATA_PLATFORM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
